This app is pretty fun but I have some suggestions.  Would be cool to have a choice on playing as either a criminal, a civilian, or a police officer.  You should also include the ability to car jack. And definitely hand to hand combat.

reviews.review_title: Love the game but needs some updates
reviews.review_description: The game is good and all that but soemthing that would be good is like a map extension new stores and areas that you can go into and some other things

I would buy this if you guys add more to the game the graphics could be nice like this its kinda like a unturned vibe it would be nice if you add more buildings that you can do stuff with maybe be able to buy a house and sell other things maybe better car mechanic and it would be nice to be able to rob people by pointing the gun at them and to be able to sell the drgs to the npcs walking it would also be cool to be able to decorate your house It would be nice if the police would be roaming the sidewalks it would also be nice to be able to buy businesses like gun stores dealership, clothing stores for making a lot of cash it would also be nice if the money you make is only useful for drgs and appliances for drgs and paying under the table in cash for rent and a way to wash the money it would also be nice if you can work regular jobs for money and get different type of drgs to sell

PS: guns are way too expensive to be honest. I still love the game though <3

reviews.review_title: Best potential for a guy like me lol
reviews.review_description: I was looking at another upcoming title and saw this right under it and decided to give it a try. Man o man did I get stuck playing this frfr lol. Graphics seem as they could be better and the police need to actually peruse you when alerted instead of turning around when you walk backwards for 10 seconds. The things I would add to this is a cell phone instead of watch and the npcs could use dialogue. Next would be scaling system from nothing to getting enough money to get the supplies instead of throwing us straight with product unless it’s just for the demo. Finally i would suggest adding traffic.for sales with nice cars that they are willing to trade you to drive fro a few hours or just buy the product. I know this is still in development but it has very big potential as long as the team keep updates and don’t put it to the side before it can blow!!!!
When is the full version coming out?
Ive only been playing for a little while but so far its been really fun

reviews.review_title: It does look good but bad
reviews.review_description: ￼ kinda looks like GTA six but bad
Update

Small map, bad graphics, ngl me and my friend downloaded it too see how bad it was based on the reviews. We were so wrong. More of a see it for yourself experience. Pistols, shotgun, and a few you need to see for yourself. Really fun with a few tiny details that make the game a lot more enjoyable.

First suggestion, make the game more interesting by adding a story line

Secondly, the game needs major improvements with the physics of the NPCs. I can kill an NPC in 2 slaps. Also the NPCs don't serve a purpose

Finally, the game has a lot of bugs like how the NPCs necks will elongate when they die.

reviews.review_title: OK, game has a lot of potential
reviews.review_description: It is not a bad game. It took me about 2 to 2 1/2 hours to beat it and I was messing around during that time, not just straight to grinding the main things they should add is more things to sell and make it harder to beat also work on a couple glitches. I was teleporting around at sometimes but definitely has potential fun game to mess around on multiplayer would make the game a lot better ￼￼￼￼
